name: Wheelchair Accessible Trnsprtn
districts_or_customers: ADA event clients (Super Bowl, F1, music festivals)
individuals across TX (Tyler, Houston, Austin, Dallas, Fort Worth), AZ, NV
recent_news: Veteran-owned operator providing wheelchair-accessible van rentals and ADA event shuttle services nationally; no school-bus contracts identified.
fit_notes: Poor fit for Summit tuck-in: business is wheelchair van rentals and ADA event shuttles, not school-bus or student transport contracts. Not a student-transportation operator.

name: Midwest Limousine

recent_news: No M&A, ownership, or school-contract news found; small Parker CO limo operator with Facebook/Manta listings only.
fit_notes: Not a school-bus operator; appears to be a small limo/chauffeur service. Out of scope for Summit tuck-in strategy.

name: Jewelride LLC
districts_or_customers: 19+ counties across Illinois Metro East and Eastern Missouri
recent_news: JewelRide announced a 10-van fleet expansion (year not stated on page); operates out of Edwardsville IL and St. Louis MO offices.
fit_notes: Marginal fit: primarily NEMT/paratransit, but does run McKinney-Vento student door-to-door routes in IL/MO. Very small (~9 employees, ~10 vans); could be a micro tuck-in to add SPED/McKinney-Vento capability in Metro East, but scale is sub-platform.

name: Care A Van Transit
districts_or_customers: Hemet, San Jacinto, Lake Elsinore, Menifee, Murrieta and unincorporated SW Riverside County, CA
recent_news: Nonprofit founded 1994 (Care-A-Van Transit Systems Inc / Prime of Life Inc); grant-funded by RCTC Measure A, FTA 5310, CDBG; no school-bus services identified.
fit_notes: Not a Summit target: grant-funded nonprofit serving seniors/disabled, not a private school-bus contractor. Out of scope (not acquirable as a tuck-in).

name: First Choice Non-Med Emergency
districts_or_customers: Memphis, TN area medical-appointment and executive clients
recent_news: SDVOSB-certified, founded 2020, USDOT 4219158; small Memphis-area NEMT/executive transport operator. No school-bus contracts identified.
fit_notes: Poor fit: 2020-founded micro NEMT/executive transport with no school-bus operation. Not a Summit tuck-in candidate.
